_comment: WORK-410 spike — the hint glyphs, extracted from hint.css's embedded data:image/svg+xml mask-images. These are CONTENT (a third category, neither skeleton nor skin): they belong in the theme icon registry (config.icons, the same source the {% icon %} rune + icon: scheme use), surfaced to CSS as a `--rf-hint-icon` custom property the skeleton's ::before reads. Per SPEC-094 §8 'icon-from-config'. This removes ~12 lines of embedded data-URIs from hint.css and lets a theme swap the glyph set without touching CSS.
